name: curated-v1
description: Operational leakage-safe repo set for benchmark scoring. Every source below is a real public repository vetted for anonymous clone access, sufficient history, and either post-cutoff recency or low-traffic obscurity.
strategy: Recent tier repos must have substantial default-branch activity after 2025-09-01 so freeze points can be selected beyond common training cutoffs. Obscure tier repos are intentionally lower-traffic codebases with enough history to yield maintainer tasks while remaining less likely to be memorized. Held-out entries stay out of the tuned slice and are used only for generalization runs.

repos.name: click
repos.notes: High-signal maintainer workflow with active 2026 history; recent-only freeze windows keep evaluation beyond common training cutoffs.

repos.name: filelock
repos.notes: Smaller active project with current maintenance activity; recent windows reduce memorization risk while preserving enough history for task generation.

repos.name: face
repos.notes: Low-traffic CLI framework chosen for obscurity rather than popularity; enough history for replay without relying on post-cutoff activity.

repos.name: httpx
repos.notes: Held-out active repo used to measure generalization on a codebase outside tuning; freeze window stays in the post-cutoff 2025-2026 span.

repos.name: aenum
repos.notes: Held-out obscure library with ongoing maintenance and modest popularity, reserved for generalization scoring.
